narrative:
Ottawa Twp. township has 5,525 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.2 percentage points.
